name: Wincher
highlight_text: Best for team collaboration and automated updates
description:
What Wincher Does

Wincher is a simple yet powerful rank tracking tool ideal for businesses and SEOs looking for an affordable, flexible solution to monitor their SEO performance and competition. Some standout aspects include daily ranking updates, intuitive competitor monitoring and alerts, automated reporting, and a user-friendly interface with unlimited user accounts supported. But it’s only limited to organic results and doesn’t track map/finder rankings.

‍

Source: Wincher

Key Features

  • Automated daily updates on tracked keyword rankings and on-demand ranking updates based on plan
  • Stay up-to-date on fluctuations with fresh data
  • Monitor competitors' keyword ranking performance and get automated alerts on important competitor movements
  • Schedule automated reports on cadence you prefer
  • Consolidate ranking data in sharable reports and customize report frequency, timing, recipients
  • Invite unlimited users to your account
  • Define granular roles and access permissions and collaborate seamlessly across your organization
  • Bird's-eye view of your site's keyword rankings
  • Identify optimization opportunities at a glance
  • Simple visualizations of core SEO data and up to 24 months of historical ranking data free
  • Track long-term progress and patterns
  • Surface new keyword opportunities, estimate traffic, costs, ranking potential, and conveniently integrate findings into rank tracking
  • Track rankings across 180+ countries, 40k cities and account for localized/proximity ranking nuances

Benefits of Wincher

  • Affordable, user-friendly rank tracking solution
  • Helps with holistic SEO performance monitoring and reporting
  • Keep close tabs on your competition easily for organic search
  • Generates insights to guide optimization priorities for your local SEO efforts
  • Seamless account management and collaboration with your team and clients
  • Historical data maintains long runways of progress that you can use to track effectiveness of your strategies

Pricing

$49 per month

Pros

✅Simple, intuitive interface and navigation

✅Affordable pricing with unlimited user model

Cons

❌Doesn’t give map/finder ranking data

❌Expensive for just tracking organic local rankings alone

‍
